creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Mon Jun 17 14:47:18 2013
New Revision: 321119
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321119

Log:
  devel/arduino: update to 1.0.5
  
  - Update to 1.0.5
  - Delete patch integrated upstream
  
  Changes: http://arduino.cc/en/Main/ReleaseNotes
  
  PR:		ports/179628
  Submitted by:	Craig Leres <leres@ee.lbl.gov> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	culot / jpaetzel (mentors, implicit)

Deleted:
  head/devel/arduino/files/patch-hardware-arduino-cores-arduino-HardwareSerial.cpp
Modified:
  head/devel/arduino/Makefile
  head/devel/arduino/distinfo
  head/devel/arduino/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/arduino/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/arduino/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 14:40:01 2013	(r321118)
+++ head/devel/arduino/Makefile	Mon Jun 17 14:47:18 2013	(r321119)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	arduino
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.5
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel java lang
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ DESKTOP_ENTRIES=	"Arduino" "Arduino IDE"
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=		ATMEGA644P DOCS EXAMPLES
 ATMEGA644P_DESC=	ATmega644p patches
-DOCS_DESC=	 	Install the reference documents
+DOCS_DESC=		Install the reference documents
 
 INSLIST=	arduino hardware lib libraries logo.png revisions.txt tools

==============================================================================
